display_text: Falcon Blade, Cost: 1125: Early-game stat item that provides balanced attributes for spellcasting carries and cores. Its primary value lies in cost-efficient health, damage, and mana sustain, making it ideal for heroes who need to stay active in lane and jungle while building toward bigger items. Stats: +14 Damage, +200 Health, +1.8 Mana Regeneration.

display_text: Falcon Blade, Cost: 1125: Provides a modest mix of survivability and damage output for its cost. display_text: Falcon Blade, Cost: 1125: Its teamfight role is providing early survivability and mana sustain to cores, allowing them to participate in skirmishes without being burst down and having enough mana to cast multiple spell rotations. It offers no active abilities, serving as a pure stat and sustain item for prolonged engagements.

display_text: Falcon Blade, Cost: 1125: Core early pickup for agility and intelligence heroes who rely on spell damage and have high attack damage scaling, such as Morphling or Medusa. It bridges the gap between starting items and major farming items, providing the stats needed to accelerate farm without delaying core item timings.

display_text: Falcon Blade, Cost: 1125: Provides farming utility by sustaining mana for wave-clearing spells and providing enough health to tank jungle camp damage, allowing for more efficient jungle rotations between waves.
